transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Potentially useful ideas about conditioned desire, withdrawal relief, and failed restraint are scattered through severely disrupted sequencing, so explanations collide with promises and conclusions instead of accumulating persuasive force.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The chapters move from a withdrawal-relief model through engineered appetite and learned preference to the failure of restraint, repeatedly reframing cessation as regained control and relief.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Belief change strengthens when causal explanation, experiential tests, and emotional reframing arrive in a deliberate sequence, allowing each insight to support the next; disrupted sequencing leaves even strong claims feeling unearned.
